dialog.from-ashes.whetstone.title: Shape %s
dialog.from-ashes.whetstone.prompt.singl: Choose the shaping result for this %2$s.
dialog.from-ashes.whetstone.prompt.multi: Choose one of %1$s shaping results for this %2$s.
dialog.from-ashes.whetstone.celt_head: A rough axe head placeholder for hafted cutting tools.
dialog.from-ashes.whetstone.knife_blade: A small flaked blade placeholder for knives and fine cutting.
dialog.from-ashes.whetstone.hammer_head: A compact head placeholder for pounding and shaping tools.
dialog.from-ashes.whetstone.invalid: That whetstone selection is no longer valid.
